examples.title: Part-time Student
examples.exampleText: A student works ten hours a week and still gets good grades by making a clear study plan.

examples.title: School Language Program
examples.exampleText: A school adds simple speaking practice every day, and students become more confident in English.

examples.title: Phone News Habit
examples.exampleText: Many teenagers get news from short videos, so they know events quickly but may miss deep details.

examples.title: Translation App
examples.exampleText: Travelers use translation apps for fast help, but they still need basic language skills in real conversations.

examples.title: Shorter Week Trial
examples.exampleText: One company tested a four-day week and found workers had lower stress and similar output.

examples.title: Tourism Income
examples.exampleText: A small town gained jobs from tourism, but local prices rose quickly for residents.

examples.title: Road Safety Rule
examples.exampleText: After stronger traffic rules, accidents dropped because drivers became more careful.

examples.title: Family Responsibility
examples.exampleText: Parents who set clear limits at home often help children avoid risky behavior.

examples.title: City Recycling Plan
examples.exampleText: A city introduced waste sorting and reduced landfill use in one year.

examples.title: School Climate Club
examples.exampleText: Students joined a climate club and helped cut paper and energy use at school.

examples.title: Bus Line Upgrade
examples.exampleText: After bus lines were improved, many workers stopped driving to the city center.

examples.title: Old Building Reuse
examples.exampleText: A historic factory was turned into a public library, keeping history and serving modern needs.
